ticket_goal: Refactor PlatformCard to use progressive disclosure for OAuth and BYOK settings.

TECHNICAL_SPECS.advocate: Moving connection details into an 'Enabled' state makes the UI cleaner and reduces cognitive load. Users are rarely connecting/disconnecting multiple times; focusing on the toggle allows them to see what's active at a glance.
TECHNICAL_SPECS.skeptic: Hiding connection status increases clicks. A user might want to see if their account is connected without needing to toggle/expand. Risk: Users forget why a platform is 'on' if they don't see the active status.
TECHNICAL_SPECS.synthesis: Implement Progressive Disclosure for configuration. Header displays name/toggle/active-status-indicator. The Body remains empty/simplified until enabled. Once enabled, the Accordion expands to show BOTH 'Connections' and 'BYOK'. This maintains clean grid aesthetics while keeping state visible.
TECHNICAL_SPECS.strategic_importance: Required for a polished, human-centric UI as the number of supported platforms grows.
TECHNICAL_SPECS.dependency_impact: Requires modification of PlatformCard.tsx and potentially ConnectionSection styling.

indicators: Clean visual hierarchy with no unnecessary configuration clutter.
Connection status remains visible via indicator in header when disabled.

fixes_applied: Updated PLATFORMS constants with status field.
Refactored SettingsContent to handle active/coming-soon categories.
Added Coming Soon UI variant with grayscale and disabled state.

expected_output.notes: Code audit complete. Build passed. 50-line rule flagged for SettingsContent.tsx - suggested refactor added to incidental observations.

fixes_applied: Centered CircularProgress in AIBYOKWizard to fix test timeout issues.
Verified 500 error in schedule page (none found, likely transient or environment-specific).
